feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Two Moons
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,117Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Eddie Diaz was frustrated in many ways.The fixer-upper house was in a worse state than he thought it would be.His relationship with his son was nowhere near to be fixed.He had already experienced so many headaches from the heat in Texas that he missed even the hottest summer in Los Angeles.And all he could think about—when he wasn’t thinking about his son—was Buck.

entry.title: You're what haunts me (now that you're away)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,558Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: “Why am I acting like this?” he said almost mockingly “You are the one who wont stop hounding me. You have been nagging me since we came back” Eddie wasn't used to this. Usually their fights mellowed down quickly but this time Buck wasn't backing down.  “So what? Me being too close is a problem now.” Eddie stared at him, wanting to make eye contact but Buck wouldn’t dare look at him. “well maybe spending too much time has made me get sick of you” Buck said almost like a whisper.   or Buck and Eddie get into a fight during their weekly dinner. Eddie does some introspection during his time away from Buck

entry.title: do i look like him?
entry.summary:
Author: clintbartonswife

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,732Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 8

Summary: He knew what it meant; the shakes, the increased secrecy, the defensiveness. He was well and truly on his way down the path of addiction.Buck also knew that he should stop. He could ask for help. Talk to someone.But that would mean admitting he had failed.There's something inherently twisted to the fact that in this moment, clutching bottles of pills, he feels closer to Bobby than he has since the man's death.Some rotten part of him finds comfort in it. Addiction runs in families - if this is the only thing he has left of his pseudo-father, then who is Buck to deny it? Misplaced spite makes him tear the bottle open.It's not like Bobby is here to stop him.--or, after the events in New Mexico, Buck develops a drug addiction.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Don't be homophobic Madison
entry.summary:
Author: pineapplehazard

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,746Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 367

Summary: Eddie : His posture was horrible!! And he WAS NOT on rythmBut because he managed to lift her twice without letting her fall that deserves 7s??? Maddie : WowWhat kind of monster did I create...?  Eddie :UghSee that's why I didn't want to watch this showIt's giving me flashbacks Maddie : Flashbacks?? 😳Flashbacks of what EXACTLY?? EDDIEEDMUNDOANSWER ME Eddie : I'll tell youBut Buck can't know about this ok?  Maddie : OMG a secret Buck doesn't know!!! 😵 Eddie : Don't make me regret it. Maddie :I'm not afraid of you 🔫Spill.  Eddie : I... I used to be a ballroom dancing champion?  Maddie : WHAAAAAAAAAAT🫵🤨 = 🕺? ________________ Eddie and Maddie finally start to interact just as Eddie is leaving for El Paso.Gossips, beef with Josh and matchmaking involved. (Canon until 8x13)

entry.title: roll credits
entry.summary:
Author: everytuesday

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,301Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 7

Summary: It should be over. Cut to the conversation at the hospital bedside, where all the things they’ve never said to each other are finally given room to breathe. Cue the outro music, roll credits, on to the rest of their lives.Eddie can see Buck’s expression shift to panic a split second before he feels the barrel of a rifle press against the back of his head.///In the middle of rescuing each other, Eddie and Buck realize they're in love. Unfortunately, the sheriff turns out to be sympathetic to Bonnie's choice of kidnapping-as-coping-mechanism, so they don't really have time for that right now.

entry.title: The Sunlight Of My Life
entry.summary:
Author: Pnk_strawberry1

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,972Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 176

Summary: When Eddie left for Texas, Buck told himself he’d be fine. He had the house, the memories, and the silence — too much of it.Then a stranger shows up at his door with news that knocks the air out of him: he’s the father of an eight-year-old girl named Alina Marie Monroe.Oh — and her mother’s dead.When Eddie finally comes home, the two of them fall into a rhythm that feels almost like a family. Almost.But love gets complicated when it’s the one thing neither of them has ever had the courage to name. Between bedtime stories, quiet mornings, and the ghosts of what-ifs, Buck and Eddie begin to realize that sometimes family isn’t something you find — it’s something you build, one heartbeat at a time.Or:Buck becomes a dad. Eddie comes home. And somewhere between friendship and forever, they find the sunlight again. ☀️Ft A short Christopher & Alina Side Story!

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 145,603Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 90

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: Oh My Cruel World, How Sad You Must Be
entry.summary:
Author: That_humanpersonthing

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,572Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 106

Summary: There is always a before, during and after for pretty much everything.Buck lives through two of those.Eddie will go through three.Or what if Buck starts to lose time, and others can’t help but hold on. So they all think of their before and during and refuse to accept the after.

entry.title: Drop the Bottle
entry.summary:
Author: em_likes_poetry

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,446Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 332

Summary: He pulled the door open, calling out his actions into the unlit home. He heard a clatter to his left. Why was the house so dark? He pawed at the wall and flicked a light on, revealing Buck kneeling on the ground, hand behind his back. “I left my keys." Or, what if Eddie went back? What if he saw what Buck was doing?

entry.summary:
Author: MysticCloud97

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,666Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 141

Summary: Buck was struggling. The pills were the only thing keeping him sane after the kidnapping. Everyone knew that he was hiding something. It just took one too many pills for them to realise how broken Buck was. Now they must rally together to bring their sunshine back. And to stop him following in Bobby's footsteps.

entry.title: loud music.
entry.summary:
Author: Buggli_006

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,383Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 31

Summary: “Nine one one what is your emergency?” “Hi so um my neighbor is playing really loud music- um” “Ma’am loud music is not an emergency. If you have a noise complaint please take that to the police station.” She was about to end the call until the mother spoke up  “No- no- you don’t understand- my daughter went around and found him unconscious? Dead? I don’t know- just help us.” Maddie quickly understood the gravity of the situation, nodding to herself. “Can you tell me your name and his?” “Yeah- yeah my name is Nicole, my daughter Ava– I think my neighbor’s name is Evan? Buck? I’m not sure we only spoke a couple of times.” Maddie froze. Evan. Buck. She cleared her through, tears stinging behind her eyes.---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------or; A angst fic where Buck overdoses and his neighbors find him

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Better The Devil You Know, Than The Devil You Don't...
entry.summary:
Author: InterrogateTheCat

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,735Chapters: 24/50Kudos: 990

Summary: Lucifer made a deal with the Buckley's, he will save Daniel and they take in and love his son Evan as their own. When the Buckley parents don't follow through with their side of the deal, Lucifer brings Evan with him to LA. This is the story of Evan Buckley the Son of the Devil, The Prince of Hell. Note:First 2 Chapters go through his life before the 118.Chapter 3 he is with the 118.Chapter 4 is when Eddie arrives. [You don't really need to watch Lucifer, but it would be helpful, but enough context will be supplied.] This is mostly in 911 universe, with comments and references from the Lucifer universe. 🫣🤭 😈 🔪 🚒 🚔 🪽

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: My Twisted Messed Up Version of 9x15
entry.summary:
Author: UrMomLover6969

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,592Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 23

Summary: Buck… is sad. And because he’s sad he takes some pills accidentally overdosing leaving the 118 to find him after he calls 911. Eddie forces Buck to talk to him not just about the kidnapping but about everything until they kiss… or maybe they don’t. Who knows?Or Buck sad - Buck do drugs - 118 find - Eddie Sad - Eddie do Buck

Author: starruvs

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 74Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: After Buckl's kidnapping, he starts to distance himself, well, not distance himself completry just being very monotone and not his old cheery self, skipping therapy "Do I creep you out?"

entry.title: Silken Sheets of the Devil
entry.summary:
Author: blackrose_17

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,832Chapters: 10/12Kudos: 681

Summary: Eddie seems like he no longer needs him Buck turns to an old lover, the one who saw something in him before no one else did Lucifer.It takes Eddie longer than he would have liked to realize that he had cut Buck out of his life, something he vowed never to do but is it too late to make things right between them now that Buck has Lucifer?
